description_long: A well-dressed adult male is depicted standing with a confident posture, hands in his pockets. He is wearing a tailored suit jacket and matching trousers over a collared shirt, with the shirt slightly open at the neck and no tie visible. The suit fits closely, suggesting a business or formal context, and the shoes are classic and polished. His hair is neatly styled, combed back and of medium length, giving a professional appearance. The facial expression is neutral, and the figure is clean-shaven. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall impression is of a professional urban pedestrian.
description: A professionally dressed adult male in a tailored suit, standing with hands in pockets and a confident, upright posture. He has neatly styled hair and wears classic dress shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, open-collared shirt, and both hands in pockets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fit of the suit, and the relaxed arm position.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and the hairstyle from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, suit fit, and hand-in-pocket stance.
attribute_posture: standing upright with hands in pockets
